subcodes.first_line: O My handmaiden! Hearken thou unto My call. By My grandeur and My glory! The call ascendeth not from the mouth of Bahá by reason of what hath come to pass [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا امتی ان استمعی ندائی فو عظمتی و جلالی لایرتفع الندآء من فم البهاء بما ورد
subcodes.subjects: @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @consolation and comfort, @praise and encouragement, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @suffering and imprisonment, @thankfulness; gratitude
